lockingPolicy.lockReason: Artifact-shape regression scenarios are the contractual proof of the extension-pointer fix; any future change to the scenario set requires explicit invalidation evidence per Gate G058/G059.

tdd.rationale: Artifact-only documentation drift; zero runtime code changed. Per policySnapshot.tdd.mode = exempt with user-request provenance.
tdd.redGreenEvidence: Red state: three greps for '056-twitter-api-connector' against state.json/spec.md/design.md exit 1 pre-fix. Green state: same three greps exit 0 post-fix; spec.md grep returns >= 2 matches; API Access Strategy heading has a 056-twitter-api-connector reference within +/- 5 lines; change-boundary confined to specs/015-twitter-connector/.

scenarios.title: state.json carries a forward pointer to spec 056
spec.md carries top-of-document banner + API Access Strategy section note
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: grep -c '056-twitter-api-connector' specs/015-twitter-connector/spec.md returns a count >= 2 (top-of-document banner + API Access Strategy section note)

scenarios.title: design.md carries an inline forward-pointer note
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: grep -q '056-twitter-api-connector' specs/015-twitter-connector/design.md exits 0 at the top of the document

scenarios.title: API Access Strategy section is no longer misleading
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: The 'API Access Strategy' heading in spec.md MUST have a '056-twitter-api-connector' reference within +/- 5 lines

scenarios.title: Fix is artifact-only
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: git diff --name-only returns only paths under specs/015-twitter-connector/
